service_file_info.repr_first_1000:
b'[Unit]
Description=Coinoskobi Backpressure Refresh Runner DENGE dryrun service
Documentation=file:///root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/reports/LATEST_PHASE26I_BACKPRESSURE_REFRESH_RUNNER_SERVICE_TIMER_PLAN_NOAPI.md
ConditionPathExists=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py
ConditionPathExists=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/public/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_staging_v1/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_cache.json

[Service]
Type=oneshot
WorkingDirectory=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py --dryrun-once
TimeoutStartSec=20
Nice=5
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true
ProtectHome=true
ProtectSystem=full
ReadWritePaths=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/public/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_staging_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/runtime/backpressure_refresh_runner_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/reports /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/data
Environment=COINOSKOBI_DENGE_MODE=1
Environment=C'

Description: Coinoskobi Backpressure Refresh Runner DENGE dryrun service

[Service]

ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/tools/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_runner_v1.py --dryrun-once
TimeoutStartSec=20
Nice=5
NoNewPrivileges=true
PrivateTmp=true

ReadWritePaths=/root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/public/backpressure_readmodel_refresh_staging_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/runtime/backpressure_refresh_runner_v1 /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/reports /root/tokenoskobi_clean_v1/data

[Timer]

'
